title: AEM WE testing protocols (NEWELY D5.1)
author: Fouda-Onana, Frédéric
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This deliverable is a report that provides the test methodologies that will be used in the NEWELY project for 
the single cell and stack assessment for AEMWE. Based on a common agreement on the testing protocols with the two 
others granted European projects ANIONE and CHANNEL, this document will report on the procedures and 
also will emphasize on the specifications of the NEWELY project. Nevertheless, the harmonized testing 
protocol wil
